securityAdvisors.interpretation: RLS ON + no policy = deny-all to PostgREST anon/authenticated roles (secure-by-default). Backend uses service_role (bypasses RLS), so tenant isolation for these tables relies on APP-LAYER org_id filters, not DB policy. No policy backstop if a query is ever under-scoped or the anon key is exposed.
